chunks.text: SM/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-6001 of 2021 Ashfaq Hussain & others..Vs.. Province of Sindh, & others ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- BEFORE: Justice Irfan Saadat Khan, Justice Agha Faisal,JJ 1. For order on CMA No.26033/2021 (U/0.1 R-10) 2. For order on CMA No.25861/2021 (U/0.1 R-10) 3. For order on CMA No.25769/2021 (U/0.1 R-10) 4. For order on CMA No.25771/2021 (U/0.1 R-10) 5. For order on office objection 6. For hearing of MAIN Case. 22.11.2021 Syed Bashir Hussain Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, A.A.G. Sindh. -.---.---.- Irfan Saadat Khan,J:- The counsel for the Petitioner states that the issue involved in the instant petition stands decided by a bench of this Court at Sukkur in C.P. No.D-755 of 2020 and by a bench of this Court at Karachi in C.P. No.D-6344/2019. The counsel for the Petitioner at the very outset stated that the instant petition may also be disposed of in the same manner and method as decided in the aforesaid petitions. Learned A.A.G. has endorsed the contention of the counsel for the petitioner. We under the circumstances, dispose of the instant petition as per the directions already given in the paragraphs No.10 & 11 of the Petition bearing CP No.D-755/2020 and paragraph No.27 of the petition bearing CP No.D-6344/2019, along with all the listed and pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE
